biz_name: ALEA Health and Wellness - Concierge Primary Care, Weight Loss, & Aesthetics

messages.body: Hello - im on
I have dropped you a text from my number
Hey, I tried calling you twice - but went straight to voicemail
My number is (917) 468-3002
Hey, we have blocked your calendar for 9 AM tomorrow. Here's the link to the meeting : https://meet.google.com/den-fgpr-dub?authuser=0&hs=122&ijlm=1764782752218
I still didn’t get a link
Please can you also drop your phone number incase call is more preferable
Yes please - ill only be able to chat for a short time due to having patients scheduled. Please send the link. Thank you
Sure
Is it possible for us to connect tomorrow at 8.30 AM or 9 AM?
Hello - i wqs chaeged again!  What fimes are you all available?
Can you please join here for the 8.30 AM meeting : https://meet.google.com/juk-dwrm-mdr
I really apologise for the inconvenience
I have noted this. Can I block 9 AM tomorrow Central Time?
Im in america on central time
I am available today until 12 PM and also tomorrow
Does around 830am work?
Can you clarify what time youre talkijg about because you obviously have the incorrect time
Let me know please
This is really frustrating that you all are so disconnected and just keep charging me and not doing anything.
Just so you know, it’s after 9 o’clock here now. You sent your message at 9 o’clock, so obviously 8:30 AM doesn’t work now because it’s past that time.
Hey, please let me know. We really need to connect and make the account up to date so we can start capturing leads. I can speak to management and request to not charge you for the month of December.
Can we connect so i can cancel my acocunt please. Its been over 2 months that you all arent doing anythihg but keep charginf me
Can I block your calendar for a meeting on Wednesday? Do let me know your availability
Hey, right now - the landing page is not linked to your Google and hence we are not able to capture new clients but the traffic has gotten better for your profile
Can we connect on a meeting sometime this week, based on your availability?
Hi Deline, how have you been?
Hello! You all just charged me qgwin when i cancelled my account. Yiu wll havent done anything for me
